title: Discovery of €1.2m jewellery prompts fresh probe into former Spanish PM
summary_full: José Luis Rodriguez Zapatero is suspected of being unable to show proof he paid import duties on the jewellery.
summary_public: José Luis Rodriguez Zapatero is suspected of being unable to show proof he paid import duties on the jewellery.
